contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: B2B outreach human-attention reallocation: warm-up auto-send + reply acceleration shipped
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/292
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/156
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/157
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/158
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/294
  
  Details:
  Audited 60 days of Agroverse retail outreach (470 AI drafts, 232 Gmail threads): 98 drafts waited median 24 days on the operator send-click while genuine prospect replies (source of all 14 retail partners) waited median 28.8h for a human response. Designed and shipped the reallocation per WARMUP_AUTOSEND_PLAN.md: (1) linter-clean warm-up drafts now auto-send via Gmail API, capped 12/day drip, kill-switched via WARMUP_AUTOSEND_ENABLED repo variable, with new email_domain_mismatch + hardened generic-inbox lint rules (caught compliance@4life.com and filler@godaddy.com in live dry-runs); (2) prospect replies now get a Grok-drafted in-thread response + operator notification within the hour (drafts never auto-sent); (3) replies are LLM-classified and unambiguous negatives auto-parked (soft-no with date -> Deferred + Follow Up Date, hard-no -> Rejected) with DApp Remarks audit trail, gated to never clobber operator-managed statuses. System armed; first live run sent 12 backlog warm-ups and reconciled all rows. Plan doc + Beer Hall PDF published in agentic_ai_context.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
